Scarcity
Most Common Mistakes
● The key to scarcity is to find where it already
naturally exists, not to create false scarcity.
● Scarcity does not have to be dependent on one aspect
of an offering. What is scarce could be a unique
combination.
● Creating artificial scarcity is likely to backfire and
undermine your persuasion attempts.
● Scarcity may change how much you want something,
but it doesn't change the experience of having it.
● Not realizing scarcity is always available when
describing what makes you unique or when using
loss languages.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
